architectural_core.design_language: <string: e.g., parametric curves, strict orthogonal grid>

primary_forms: <string: e.g., cantilevered concrete slabs, glass curtain walls>

material_1.imperfections: <string: e.g., formwork tie-hole marks, rust streaks, efflorescence>

joinery_and_details.connections: <string: e.g., exposed steel bolts, seamless silicone glazing>

façade_and_fenestration.glass_properties: <string: e.g., low-E coating green tint, slight warpage/distortion in reflections>

natural_illumination.sun_position: <string: azimuth and elevation, e.g., low golden hour sun>
natural_illumination.shadow_play: <string: e.g., sharp geometric cast shadows, dappled light through louvers>
natural_illumination.global_illumination: <string: light bouncing off adjacent colored surfaces (radiosity)>

fixtures: <string: e.g., recessed floor uplights, linear LED coves>
artificial_lighting.color_temperature: <string: e.g., 3000K warm white vs 6000K cool twilight>

weather_and_atmosphere.atmospheric_perspective: <string: mist, smog, dust suspended in light shafts>
weather_and_atmosphere.surface_weathering: <string: water runoff stains, moss accumulation at base>

optical_and_photographic_setup.exposure_and_dynamic_range: <string: HDR rendering, clipped highlights, deep crushed blacks>
